agent_summary: Customer reported a phishing attempt where an impersonator claiming to be from bKash asked for their OTP, threatening account blockage. No transaction history is available.
recommended_next_action: Reassure the customer that bKash never asks for PIN/OTP. Escalate to fraud_risk for investigation into the reported phishing attempt.
customer_reply: Dear customer, thank you for reporting this incident (Ticket ID: TKT-005). Please be aware that bKash never asks for your PIN, OTP, or password. Do not share these details with anyone. We are investigating this report.
